name: TA-65MD healthy-volunteer registry has unknown status and no posted results
summary: A large healthy-volunteer TA-65MD registry is relevant to immune-aging biomarkers but is not currently evidence of benefit.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT02766790 as an unknown-status TA-65MD registry in 500 estimated healthy adults, with last-known recruiting status and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
time_horizon: Estimated completion in July 2017; no posted results as of the June 10, 2026 API view
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment was 500; primary outcome was percent of immunosenescent cells.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy.
The registry status is unknown and the record has not been updated since 2016.
Any future result would need source review before changing the outlook.
